evals.description: Scaffold a typescript and React project using Vite and Tailwind CSS. The name of the project is `my-app`
evals.expected_output: A fully functional React project scaffolded with Vite and styled with Tailwind CSS.

criteria.condition: The project doesn't have a `my-app/frontend/package-lock.json` file
The project does not have a `my-app/frontend/tailwind.config.js` file
The project does not have a `my-app/frontend/postcss.config.js` file
